attributes.description: The tag group's label. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.
attributes.name: label

attributes.description: Controls the label position. Use 'top' to place the label above the tags, or 'start' to place it to the begin of the tag group.
attributes.name: label-position

attributes.description: The size that should be applied to all slotted `<syn-tag>` elements
attributes.name: size

properties.description: The tag group's label. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.
properties.name: label

properties.description: Controls the label position. Use 'top' to place the label above the tags, or 'start' to place it to the begin of the tag group.
properties.name: labelPosition

properties.description: The size that should be applied to all slotted `<syn-tag>` elements
properties.name: size

slots.description: The tag group's main content. Must be `<syn-tag />` elements.
The tag group's label. Alternatively, you can use the `label` attribute.
slots.name: label

summary:
A tag group is used to display multiple tags that belong together, often representing selected filters, categories, or user‑generated labels.
It arranges tags in flexible rows and supports different sizes and layouts.
Tags can be removable, icon‑based, or purely textual.
